flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Peru State College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.4k → 1.1k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Peru State College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $8.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Peru State College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.7k → $8.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Peru State College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
